## ✅ Quality Gate Checklist
*Before requesting a review, verify the following (see `QUALITY_GATES.md`):*

- [ ] Automated tests (unit, integration) pass successfully.
- [ ] Code follows formatting/linting standards for Backend (Java) & Frontend (React).
- [ ] No hard-coded credentials or explicit tokens are included.
- [ ] UI components reflect the "WOW" aesthetics standard (rich styles, smooth transitions).
- [ ] There are no console errors or regressions.
